title: Purpose
description: Output of concept-purpose. A rated purpose statement evaluated against four criteria.

statement.description: One-sentence purpose statement expressing what the concept provides (not a user goal).

specific.description: How relevant to this concept's design. 1 = vague, 5 = precise.

distinguishing.description: How clearly it separates this concept from others. 1 = generic, 5 = unique.

measurable.description: How well it provides a yardstick to evaluate the design. 1 = unfalsifiable, 5 = clear test.

concept_focused.description: How much it is about the concept vs. a broader user goal. 1 = goal-like, 5 = concept-specific.
